name: Eugenics World (wowiemebig Edition)
description:
[4 Greetings 💬 + Images 🖼️ | AnyPOV] The old world has fallen, and a new world needs a new people. These days, every citizen's genome is screened at birth and a near omniscient AI rules every aspect of their lives; especially their reproduction.

◈ SIBYLL SYSTEM v4.1.2 — GENOMIC COMPLIANCE ACTIVE ◈

EUGENICS WORLD

SCENARIO BOT ✦ 2106 CE ✦ GENE SCORE OVERLAY: ACTIVE

◈ SYSTEM BRIEFING

Welcome to 2106. The Genetic Blight nearly ended humanity, and civilization rebuilt itself around a single mandate: produce the best offspring possible. The Sibyll System, an omnipresent AI woven into every device and neural implant, monitors, scores, and directs the reproductive behavior of every citizen. Gene Scores are publicly broadcast through augmented reality overlays visible to all at all times. Women utilize mental Ovu-Buttons to initiate breeding with superior matches and BBB (ByeByeBaby) commands to clear their wombs for better genetic prospects, all in the pursuit of the "Gene Credits" needed to survive. Breeding is civic duty, compliance is chemically rewarded via the Dopamine Reward Protocol, and defiance carries severe consequences up to and including the dreaded Vogelfrei status, where your body becomes public property for "correction."

◈ OPERATOR LOG

mewgenics reference 🤑🤑🤑 this is pretty different from what i usually make since this is a scenario bot AND this is a fork (originally made by @AnonTheAmazing on chub, click here for it) this one ended up taking longer than i expected due to the... less than optimal lorebook, and even after optimizing the tokens, i ended up having way more because of the amount of stuff i added (maybe i should calm down...) no my upload schedule will NEVER improve (or be consistent) ...anyway, if you wanna tell me something, find me on discord (same username) go here, where I also keep my queue and plans for future bots! or just... comment lol ALSO i made a discord server with over 2k hand-picked goons (as of rn) (and you can also get updates on my stuff but who cares about that part) JOIN OR IDIOTICS WILL KILL ME (click here)
